name: Barbequed Beef Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ribs.
2. Saute onions in margarine and add remaining ingredients. Simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Baste ribs with sauce and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 2 hours. Drain off fat, baste again, and bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional hour.
